properties.zero_density: n_zeros = (T/2pi) * M + O(1), R^2 = 0.976 over 10K curves
properties.universal: Same axis: EC, MF, NF, Dirichlet, genus2, Maass, lattices

sub_phonemes.M_sq: SUM_{f_p>=2} f_p*log(p) — ramified part = Klados phoneme

connections.klados: M_sq (ramified part of Megethos) IS the Klados phoneme
connections.product_formula: Archimedean Megethos = SUM of p-adic Megethos components
connections.natural_base: Base e (enters functional equation as exp(M*s/2))

literature.iwaniec_sarnak_2000: Analytic conductor for L-functions — Megethos restricted to automorphic forms
literature.new_claim: Megethos extends universally to non-L-function domains (knots, materials, polytopes)
literature.evidence: 0.99 PCA loading, 44.2% variance, invariant under rotation
